scripts.lint: pnpm verify:foundation && pnpm --filter @categoryfix/shop-admin lint && pnpm --filter @categoryfix/marketing typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm verify:foundation && pnpm --filter @categoryfix/db prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @categoryfix/shop-admin test && pnpm --filter @categoryfix/marketing test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @categoryfix/db prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @categoryfix/shop-admin typecheck && pnpm --filter @categoryfix/marketing typecheck
